title: Holiday fitness festival for Plett
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Planet Fitness is set...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Planet Fitness is set to transform Plettenberg Bay into a playground for training, wellness and celebration.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Planet Fitness is set to transform Plettenberg Bay into a playground for training, wellness and celebration."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"From Monday to Sunday, 15 to 21 December, the town will come alive with Train Plett, a week-long hybrid \"wellness village\" where a year-round training mindset meets holiday vibes and festival energy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The seven-day experience is designed for athletes, families, holidaymakers and anyone ready to move, recover, recharge and connect.","html":"The seven-day experience is designed for athletes, families, holidaymakers and anyone ready to move, recover, recharge and connect."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jenna Rivera, head of marketing at Planet Fitness, says that the week is a celebration of hybrid training and community.","html":"Jenna Rivera, head of marketing at Planet Fitness, says that the week is a celebration of hybrid training and community."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"We wanted to create something that pulls people together in a place that feels energising and unforgettable. Plett gives us the perfect backdrop to mix training, teamwork and a bit of adventure in a way that feels fun, thrilling and genuinely exciting.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The site of the festival will be the soccer grounds and nearby areas at the entrance to Greenwood Bay College.","html":"The site of the festival will be the soccer grounds and nearby areas at the entrance to Greenwood Bay College."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The zones include:"},{"type":"list","items":["Hybrid Zone: Featuring Hyrox simulations to get your blood pumping, and yoga and reformer Pilates classes for strength, mobility, and calm.","Experience Zone: Partner activations include a recovery lounge with ice baths and compression boots, the Schnoz Strips Booth (for better breathing and harder training), a coffee truck and fully supervised kids and pets zones.","Delish Food Village and Bar: Highlights include the braai station by Chef Peter Goffe-Wood, award-winning chef."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Fun runs: There will be two fun runs, a 2km or 5km, complete with hydration stations and post-run stretch zones.","html":"Fun runs: There will be two fun runs, a 2km or 5km, complete with hydration stations and post-run stretch zones."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Planet Fitness members enjoy free access to the Hybrid Zone."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Elevate members enjoy free access to reformer Pilates and yoga classes. Everyone has free access to the supervised kids' and pets' zones.","html":"Elevate members enjoy free access to reformer Pilates and yoga classes. Everyone has free access to the supervised kids' and pets' zones."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Non-members also have options: For more information, send a WhatsApp to 060 014 877.","html":"Non-members also have options: For more information, send a WhatsApp to 060 014 877."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Doing the circuit.","html":"Doing the circuit."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Recovery lounge","html":"Recovery lounge"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
